name: PT Duta Anggada Realty Tbk.
summary: PT Duta Anggada Realty Tbk. engages in the real estate development activities in Indonesia. It develops and rents apartments, office buildings, hotels, and shopping centers in Jakarta and Bali. The company also provides tourism hospitality services. The company was formerly known as PT Duta Anggada Inti Pratama and changed its name to PT Duta Anggada Realty Tbk. in April 1997. PT Duta Anggada Realty Tbk. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
